prompt: Create a serene surreal landscape illustration at dawn: a single vintage red cable-car gondola hangs from three diagonal black cables running from the upper left toward the center-right, suspended above an endless mirror-smooth flooded plain. The gondola is boxy with large windows, a dark roof frame, and a small metal tower and pulley assembly above it; it sits in the left third of the square composition, slightly above center. The water below creates a clear but softly rippled inverted reflection of the gondola, support tower, and cables. In the misty distance on the right half, show exactly five pale stone ruin arches rising from the water: one large tall arch near the right edge, one medium arch closer to center, two very small faint arches near the horizon, and one thin partial arch far right; all reflected vertically in the water. Use a pastel morning palette of soft blue, blush pink, lavender haze, and warm peach light, with the horizon nearly dissolved into fog. The sky is vast and minimal with delicate horizontal pink cloud streaks on the upper right. Style should feel like a dreamy cinematic digital painting with subtle painterly brush texture, atmospheric perspective, soft gradients, calm symmetry, and no people, no birds, no text, no watermark. Square 1:1 composition, quiet “good morning” mood, high detail in the gondola and cables, softer detail in the distant ruins.
